conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I'm building a microservices backend. I need to decide between REST and GraphQL for the API layer.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: GraphQL sounds appealing because of the flexible querying, but our mobile clients have very predictable data needs.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Also, most of my backend engineers have never used GraphQL in production.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I'm going to go with REST. The learning curve for GraphQL isn't worth it right now.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Actually, one of our services is a reporting dashboard that needs very flexible queries. I'll use GraphQL just for that one service and REST everywhere else.

query: What did the user decide about the API design for their microservices backend?
